subtitle.ja: 人差し指の構えから始めます。右手のそれぞれの指にかかっている糸を向こう側に1回転ねじります
subtitle.en: Begin with the "Opening A". Twist once away from you each string on the fingers of the right hand.

subtitle.ja: 左手のそれぞれの指にかかっている糸を向こう側に1回転ねじります
subtitle.en: Twist once away from you each string on the fingers of the left hand.

subtitle.ja: 左右の人差し指に親指の糸を移します
subtitle.en: Transfer the thumb strings to the index fingers of both hands.

subtitle.ja: 左右の親指で、人差し指手前の下側の糸を押し下げて小指手前の糸を下から取ります
subtitle.en: With both thumbs, press down the near lower index strings and pick up from below the near little-finger strings.

subtitle.ja: 両手小指の糸を外します
左右人差し指の上の糸を親指に移します
subtitle.en: Transfer the upper index strings of both hands to the thumbs.

subtitle.ja: 左右の人差し指で親指の上の糸を押さえ、親指の下の糸を人差し指に移します
subtitle.en: With both index fingers, hold down the upper thumb strings and transfer the lower thumb strings to the index fingers.

subtitle.ja: 左右の親指の糸を指の根本に下げ、人差し指の上の糸を親指に移します
subtitle.en: Slide the thumb strings of both hands down to the bases of the thumbs, and transfer the upper index strings to the thumbs.

subtitle.ja: 左右の人差し指で親指の上の糸を押さえ、親指の下の糸を人差し指に移します(2回目)
subtitle.en: With both index fingers, hold down the upper thumb strings and transfer the lower thumb strings to the index fingers again.

subtitle.ja: 左右の親指の糸を指の根本に下げ、人差し指の上の糸を親指に移します(2回目)
subtitle.en: Slide the thumb strings of both hands down to the bases of the thumbs again, and transfer the upper index strings to the thumbs.

subtitle.ja: 右手親指を手前方向に1回転させてねじります
subtitle.en: Twist the right thumb once toward yourself.

subtitle.ja: 左手親指を手前方向に1回転させてねじります
subtitle.en: Twist the left thumb once toward yourself.

subtitle.ja: 左右の小指を、人差し指の糸の下を通して親指向こうの2本の糸を上から握ります
subtitle.en: With both little fingers, pass under the index strings and grasp from above the two far thumb strings.

subtitle.ja: 左右の親指で、人差し指手前の糸を取ります
subtitle.en: With both thumbs, pick up the near index strings.

subtitle.ja: 左右の親指から、人差し指と繋がっている上の糸を残したまま、下の2本の糸だけを外します
subtitle.en: From both thumbs, keep the single upper strings that run to the index fingers, and release only the two lower strings.

subtitle.ja: 左右の親指と人差し指の指先を合わせ、人差し指の糸を親指に移します
subtitle.en: Bring the tips of the thumbs and index fingers together, and transfer the index strings to the thumbs.

subtitle.ja: 左右の人差し指で、親指向こうの2本の糸を下からとり、親指の糸を外して完成です
subtitle.en: With both index fingers, pick up from below the two far thumb strings, then release the thumb strings to complete the figure.
